creator: dragos240@gmail.com
text:
When I connect to the internet through a wireless Zydas USB connection,
I will receive the following message "zyd0: unsupported rate 0". It seems
to occur when the wireless device is used: For example, say I ping a server,
it will occur once. Or if I am downloading something, it will spam this
many times.

Fix: 

None. Hoping for a solution.
How-To-Repeat: Plug in or purchase a wireless zydas USB device to a freebsd machine, and
configure it, then try to ping a server.
